column2:
### Task

List public databases that host ATAC-seq data from human samples with Type 2 Diabetes (T2D).

### Output Format

| Database Name | URL | ATAC-seq Availability | Notes |

### Constraints

* Disease must be Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) only
* ATAC-seq only (exclude RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, etc.)
* Include only databases/repositories (not individual datasets)
* Publicly accessible resources only
* Minimum 5, maximum 10 entries
Disease must be Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) only; ATAC-seq only; Include only databases/repositories; Publicly accessible resources only; Minimum 5, maximum 10 entries

column3: ✅ Yes — bulk and scATAC-seq datasets (e.g., GSE194401)
column4: Primary repository for functional genomics. Search "ATAC-seq" AND "Type 2 Diabetes" AND "Homo sapiens". Open access.

column3: ✅ Yes — raw FASTQ/BAM files for ATAC-seq runs
column4: Complements GEO; hosts the raw sequencing data underlying GEO series. Search ATAC-seq[Strategy] AND "type 2 diabetes". Open access.

column3: ✅ Yes — controlled-access ATAC-seq from clinical cohorts
column4: Major host for human islet ATAC-seq from T2D donor studies. Managed access via Data Access Committee (DAC) application required.

column3: ✅ Yes — standardized ATAC-seq across human tissues/cell lines
column4: Contains pancreatic islet and metabolically relevant tissue ATAC-seq. Gold-standard processing pipelines. Open access.

column3: ✅ Yes — curated ATAC-seq atlas with disease annotations
column4: Aggregates >4,000 human ATAC-seq samples from GEO/SRA. Includes T2D-relevant risk SNP and GWAS variant annotations overlaid on chromatin accessibility regions. Open access.

column3: ✅ Yes — metabolic disease-focused epigenomic data including ATAC-seq
column4: Specialized for T2D and metabolic traits; integrates ATAC-seq with GWAS, eQTL, and chromatin state data. Open access.

column1: Diabetes Genome Atlas / T2D Knowledge Portal
column3: ✅ Yes — ATAC-seq annotations integrated with T2D genetic data
column4: AMP T2D consortium portal. Includes islet ATAC-seq tracks, chromatin state annotations, and open chromatin data for variant-to-function mapping. Open access.

column3: ✅ Yes — pancreatic islet-specific ATAC-seq & open chromatin maps
column4: Specialized browser for human islet regulatory landscapes. Integrates ATAC-seq with enhancer maps, TF binding, and T2D GWAS signals. Open access.

List public databases containing ATAC-seq data from human pancreatic islets or beta cells in Type 2 Diabetes (T2D).

### Output Format

Database Name:
URL:
Sample Type: Islets / Beta cells / Both
Access: API / FTP / Direct download
Notes:

column5: Primary public repository. Contains bulk and scATAC-seq from T2D and non-diabetic human islet donors.
Hosts raw FASTQ/BAM files underlying GEO series. Provides run-level metadata.
Hosts controlled-access ATAC-seq from clinical T2D islet cohorts. Major source for European consortium studies.
Central consortium portal for multi-omic human pancreas data. Hosts bulk ATAC-seq and snATAC-seq from 40+ donors.
Integrates HPAP snATAC-seq data from 41 donors with interactive cell browser and chromatin accessibility maps.
Hosts the HPAP Islet Chromatin Accessibility Map with processed snATAC-seq data. Provides interactive tools.
Hosts curated single-cell datasets including pancreatic islet scATAC-seq. Census API enables programmatic queries.
Specialized visualization tool for human islet regulatory genomics. Integrates ATAC-seq with enhancer annotations.
AMP T2D consortium portal integrating islet ATAC-seq chromatin state annotations with T2D GWAS summary statistics.
Metabolic disease-focused atlas integrating ATAC-seq with GWAS, eQTL, and chromatin state data for T2D-relevant tissues.

### Task

Identify databases that provide programmatic access (API/FTP) to ATAC-seq data from Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) human samples.

### Output Format

| Database | API/FTP Available | Access Type | URL |

### Context

Here is a list of databases with ATAC-seq data from Type 2 Diabetes (T2D)...

### Task

Score each database (1–3 scale):
1. Data quality (QC/standardization)
2. Accessibility (API/FTP availability)
3. T2D annotation clarity (clear disease labeling)

### Output Format

| Database | Quality | Accessibility | T2D Clarity | Total |

### Context

Known databases: GEO, ENCODE, Cistrome, ATACdb, ChIP-Atlas, Roadmap Epigenomics, ArrayExpress, IHEC

### Task

List any additional public databases NOT in the list above that contain ATAC-seq data from Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) human samples.

### Output Format

Name:
URL:
What makes it unique:

Fully API-driven pancreas single-cell knowledge base, offering complex graph queries.
Lab-curated analysis portal specifically for HPAP islet snATAC-seq with interactive UI.
Standardized single-cell data platform with cross-dataset Census Python/R SDK queries.
Purpose-built genome browser for human pancreatic islet regulatory elements.
Central portal for variant-to-function mapping integrating ATAC-seq with GWAS.
Specialized atlas for metabolic disease genomics with specific T2D features.
Integrates islet ATAC-seq with genotype data and expression QTLs.
